caption: Passage of lines (triplex acies, closes #377): three player Infantry units already three fights deep box-select their fresh reserve line, the player presses X to switch the group-order mode to Distributed, then right-clicks the center tired unit. Distributed relief pairs each fresh unit with its own engaged tired partner -- sorted by proximity to the clicked unit, so a pairing can cross rather than always matching the nearest reliever to the nearest tired unit -- instead of every reliever swapping with just the one unit clicked. All three tired lines get a real MOVE (retreat) order and all three fresh units close on their own partner's fight by the end of the clip, verified by state dump: at tick 145 each reliever's current_order is RELIEF with a distinct target_enemy_uid inherited from a different tired unit, and by tick 215 the fresh units have caught up to their partners' fights.
